name: Wallibe — Live Wallpaper New Tab
description: Beautiful live wallpapers (video, WebGL shaders, animated gradients) on every new tab with clock and smart search.
author: Wallibe

content_security_policy.extension_pages: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com; font-src https://fonts.gstatic.com; img-src 'self' data: https:; media-src 'self' blob:; connect-src https://www.google.com
